items.headline: 'Quest for the Stanley Cup' premieres May 5, 2026
items.description: NEW YORK – Quest for the Stanley Cup, the long-running behind-the-scenes series chronicling the Stanley Cup Playoffs, returns this season exclusively on the NHL’s YouTube channel. Produced by NHL Productions, the first episode in the four-part series is now available to watch here.

items.headline: Minnesota Twins wear Wild jerseys on road trip
items.description:
The Minnesota Twins know how to fly in style.
As the MLB team left for its road trip on Monday, each baseball player rocked a Minnesota Wild jersey, showing support for their local NHL team currently in the second round of the Stanley Cup Playoffs.

items.headline: Alex Lyon Jakub Dobes goalie matchup Eastern Second Round
items.description: Goaltending is an integral part of the Stanley Cup Playoffs. To better understand the strengths and weaknesses of each goalie, NHL.com charted 100 goals against each one late in the regular season and through the first round of the postseason to see the patterns that emerge. items.description:

items.headline: Brian Gionta 'rooting for both teams' in Montreal-Buffalo series
items.description:
MONTREAL -- Brian Gionta wore the captain’s “C” for seven consecutive NHL seasons -- from 2010-14 for the Montreal Canadiens, then from 2014-17 for the Buffalo Sabres.
Now, the Canadiens and Sabres are about to lock up in the Eastern Conference Second Round, their first Stanley Cup Playoff duel since

items.headline: Gustavsson to start in goal for Wild in Game 2 against Avalanche NHL playoffs
items.description:
DENVER -- Filip Gustavsson will start in goal for the Minnesota Wild in Game 2 of the Western Conference Second Round against the Colorado Avalanche at Ball Arena on Tuesday (8 p.m. ET; ESPN, SN, TVAS, CBC).
It will be Gustavsson’s first appearance in the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs. Jesper

items.headline: Nic Dowd making playoff impact for Vegas Golden Knights following trade
items.description:
LAS VEGAS -- When the Vegas Golden Knights considered whom to select from the Los Angeles Kings in the 2017 NHL Expansion Draft, they narrowed their choices to two players: Nic Dowd and Brayden McNabb.
"I think they took the right guy," Dowd said.
It's hard to argue with that.

items.headline: Coaches Room: Carolina Hurricanes have blueprint for success in Stanley Cup Playoffs
items.description:
The Coaches Room is a regular feature throughout the 2025-26 season by former NHL coaches and assistants who turn their critical gaze to the game and explain it through the lens of a teacher.

items.headline: NHL EDGE stats Buffalo Sabres Montreal Canadiens playoffs 2026
items.description: NHL.com's fantasy staff continues to cover the latest trends and storylines in the League through the lens of NHL EDGE puck and player tracker stats. Today, we provide three underlying metrics to watch for in the upcoming Stanley Cup Playoffs series between the Buffalo Sabres and Montreal Canadiens.

items.headline: Victor Hedman stepped away from Tampa Bay Lightning for mental health
items.description:
Victor Hedman said he stepped away from the Tampa Bay Lightning this season to focus on his mental health.
"I've spent most of my life in this game, and nearly all of my career with this organization," Hedman said in a statement on social media before meeting with the media

items.headline: Noah Dobson expects to feel better for Canadiens in Eastern Second Round
items.description:
TAMPA -- Noah Dobson turned to his left in the Montreal Canadiens locker room at Benchmark International Arena on Sunday, trying to figure out what teammates Phillip Danault and Mike Matheson were doing.

items.headline: Eric Robinson to enjoy homecoming in Game 3 with Carolina
items.description:
RALEIGH, N.C. -- Eric Robinson grew up going to Philadelphia Flyers games in the Stanley Cup Playoffs.
The next one he attends will be very different.

items.description:
